name: Jordan
profile: Active gym-goer and strength training enthusiast, works out 4–5 days per week.
goals: Understand energy recovery after strength workouts
See how nutrition affects post-workout energy

logging_pattern.summary: Morning strength workouts, midday nutritious meals, occasional evening walks.
typical_entries: 60–90 min strength session with pre/post feelings
Grilled chicken, brown rice, broccoli at lunch
20–30 min easy walk on some evenings
